import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def task_func(data):
    # Convert string prices to float, handle commas as thousand separators
    data['Price'] = data['Price_String'].str.replace(",", "").astype(float)

    # Calculate statistical measures (mean, median, and standard deviation)
    stats_dict = {
        'mean': np.mean(data['Price']),
        'median': np.median(data['Price']),
        'std_dev': np.std(data['Price'])
    }

    # Create a histogram of the prices
    plt.figure()
    n, bins, patches = plt.hist(data['Price'], bins='auto', color='blue', alpha=0.7, rwidth=0.85)

    # Set title and labels for the histogram
    plt.title('Histogram of Product Prices')
    plt.xlabel('Price')
    plt.ylabel('Frequency')

    return stats_dict, plt.gca()  # Return statistics dictionary and histogram axes object
